result_context: El área del triángulo es {area} m².

steps: Identificar base y altura del triángulo
mistakes: Confundir altura con lado del triángulo
No usar unidades consistentes
Olvidar dividir por 2 en el área

es.name: Calculadora de Área del Triángulo
es.desc: Calcula Área = (base × altura) / 2. Ejemplo: base 8 m, altura 5 m = Área = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
es.seo_description: Calcula Área = (base × altura) / 2. Ejemplo: base 8 m, altura 5 m = Área = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
es.example_label: Calculate the area of a triangular roof section with 14.5m base and 8.75m height for material estimation

range_hints.base: Typical: 1-100m for construction; any positive value
range_hints.altura: Must be perpendicular height; range: 0.5-200m typical

es.result_context: The area ({area}) represents the surface of the triangle, calculated as half the product of base and perpendicular height.

steps.description: Result: Triangle area equals 63.44 square units

mistakes: Using slant height instead of perpendicular height from base to apex
Forgetting to divide by 2 (calculating as rectangle instead)
Not ensuring height is measured at 90° to the base

input_type_review.reason: Appropriate; adding length units would clarify measurement type
Correct; should emphasize this is perpendicular height, not side length
